title: Improving Automation History Feature with Date Range Filter and Export Option
excerpt: The current implementation of the Automation History feature presents a usability challenge due to the pagination of results and the lack of a date range filter. Users are limited to viewing only 100 results at a time an…

posts.author: choltagi (Cameron)
posts.cookedHtml:
The current implementation of the Automation History feature presents a usability challenge due to the pagination of results and the lack of a date range filter. Users are limited to viewing only 100 results at a time and have to manually scroll through irrelevant data to find the information they need. This results in wasted time and effort that could be better spent on other tasks.

To improve the usability of this feature, it is recommended to add a date range filter that allows users to specify the start and end dates of the automation history they wish to view. This would significantly reduce the time and effort required to find the relevant information. Additionally, an export option would be useful to enable users to quickly extract the data they need in a more manageable format.
